hivemindAdaptations: Captures the local video shot-list and transcript-alignment workflow from Liam's requested frame dissection.
Defaults to local ffmpeg scene detection, contact sheets, embedded subtitles, OCR, and local ASR when available.
Requires explicit user approval before uploading user-supplied local media to external transcription or vision services.
Includes a deterministic helper script that writes local manifests, representative frames, OCR TSV, an audio WAV, and a draft shot list.
